Detailed Description

Base class to derive from for use as user buffer.

Examples
edgedetect_cuda.cpp, edgedetect_opencl.cpp, and user_buffer.cpp.

Member Function Documentation

◆ RegisterMemory()

virtual void NeoAPI::BufferBase::RegisterMemory ( void *  memory,
size_t  size 
)
virtual

providing a continues memory block used for a whole buffer

To obtain the required size Cam::f().PayloadSize.Get() should be used.

Note
when memory blocks where registered with RegisterSegment before these memories will be unregistered from this buffer.
Parameters
[in]memoryaddress to the memory
[in]sizesize of the memory
Exceptions
InvalidArgumentExceptionwhen buffer is already assigned to a camera object
Examples
edgedetect_cuda.cpp, and user_buffer.cpp.

◆ RegisterSegment()

virtual void NeoAPI::BufferBase::RegisterSegment ( void *  memory,
size_t  size,
uint32_t  segment_id = 0 
)
virtual

provide memory used for a specific buffer segment

To obtain the required size NeoAPI::ImageInfo::GetSegmentSize() should be used.

Note
When a memory block was registered with RegisterMemory before this memory will be unregistered from this buffer.
Only when all registered memories for their segments are big enough and when the underlying producer support composite buffers (segments) the buffer is used during acquisition.
Parameters
[in]memoryaddress to the memory
[in]sizesize of the memory
[in]segment_idsegment identifier
Exceptions
InvalidArgumentExceptionwhen buffer is already assigned to a camera object
Examples
edgedetect_opencl.cpp.

◆ UnregisterMemory()

virtual void NeoAPI::BufferBase::UnregisterMemory ( )
virtual

unregister all previous assigned memories

If the buffer object is assigned to a camera the buffer will be revoked automatically.

Examples
edgedetect_cuda.cpp, edgedetect_opencl.cpp, and user_buffer.cpp.
